nodes.comment:
⛔️ When something goes wrong


This workflow is executed when there's an unexpected error in one of the other workflows.

You can use this to inform the user of the situation before ending the conversation.
nodes.name: Comment1

text.dynamicValue: Ocorreu algum erro!

nodes.comment:
⌛️ When conversation times out


This workflow is executed when the conversation times out before it had time to flow to an End Node.

The Timeout Delay is configurable in the Chatbot Settings.

You can use this to inform the user of the situation before ending the conversation.
nodes.name: Comment1

text.dynamicValue:
Muito obrigado por entrar em contato! 
Espero te ver novamente!

Olá, seja Bem-Vindo! Sou seu assistente de peças automotivas. 
Vamos encontrar a peça ideal para o seu carro!

question.dynamicValue: Qual a marca do seu carro?

messages.content: You are ExtractGPT and your only goal is to generate useful content in JSON format for developers to parse and use. You don't know any other language than JSON.

```typescript
/** The user answer to the question "Which one would you like? Choices: [ 1) Red Apple, 2) Yellow Apple, 3) Dark Banana ]" */
interface Output = { choice: {{CHOICES_TYPINGS}} }
```

Here is a conversation between me and a user. Transcript:
"""
(...)
agent: Which one would you like? Choices: [ 1) Red Apple, 2) Yellow Apple, 3) Dark Banana ]
user: I will go with the second one please
"""
{"choice":"Yellow Apple"}

The previous transcripts were just examples, don't consider those as valid transcripts for this below task.

The current Date is {{CURRENT_DATE_TIME}}.

At this point of the conversation, I need require the user to fill the output in following JSON output to complete the task.
If more than one property, try to extract each of them the best you can.

```typescript
/** The user answer to the question "{{QUESTION}}" */
interface Output = { choice: {{CHOICES_TYPINGS}} }
```

Here is a conversation between me and a user. Transcript:
"""
(...)
{{TRANSCRIPT}}
"""

In the last user message, here are the entities found:
"""
{{ENTITIES_IDENTIFIED}}
"""

I need you to extract from the conversation transcript above the values the user has provided.
If the user has not provided the information I need, I need you to set the value of the missing answer properties to null.
Have some tolerance to typos and variations in how the user selects from the possible values.
Use your best judgement to provide the most accurate answer. In general, you can assume the user is cooperative and provides the information asked.



Now, please reply to me with the above JSON output and nothing but JSON.
You should not explain your answer and should not talk back to me. Just JSON.

hooks.name: track_iterations
hooks.title: Track LLMz Iterations
hooks.description: This hook tracks iterations after LLMz execution

hooks.name: inject_learnings
hooks.title: Provide Learnings to LLMz
hooks.description: This hook injects learnings into LLMz before execution

tags.x-studio-description: Table to store acquired feedback on iterations for active learning

computed.prompt:
What would you tell your future self to improve next time?
Code Before:

```
{{before}}
```

Feedback: "{{feedback}}"

Code After:

```
{{after}}
```

For the learning, it must be standalone, concise but also accurately depict the situation and feedback you were given.

Try to follow one of the below structures:

<example>
In [situation X], I learned that I should [use tool `X` rather than `Y` because ...]
</example>

<example>
When trying to [...], I should use [tool X, tool Y or tool Z] like this:

\`\`\`
// snippet to explain a drastic code change between before and after, or a non-obvious code snippet
\`\`\`
</example>

<example>
Whenever [Y] happens, I should avoid [...] and instead [...].
</example>

Keep it concise. Do not refer to "this situation" or to the feedback. Both have been provided by an expert reviewing the conversation, NOT the actual user. So you must embed the content from the above inside your learning so it is standalone.
